TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Libu ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 27 buwan, 103 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 99 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Libu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Libu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Libu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Libu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Libu hya' ga Llyung. tay 'llaw na Libu hya' ga Batul. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ liβu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa βatul. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Libu ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 27 buwan, 103 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 99 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Libu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Libu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Libu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Libu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Libu hya' ga Llyung. tay 'llaw na Libu hya' ga Batul. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ liβu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na liβu ħjaʔ ɣa βatul. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
